title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at SAIL

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at SAIL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, SAIL in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SAIL:
SAIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
